# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest released version of kickr is supported with security updates.

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| Latest  | ✅         |
| Older   | ❌         |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please report it through **GitHub**'s private vulnerability [reporting system](https://github.com/kickr-dev/kickr/security/advisories/new).
